PETITION Petition For Order Compelling Attorney-In-Fact To Account And For Order Awarding Reasonable Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PES-13-296424 The Estate of Joan Saphir Alexander and PES-14-297476 In Re: Susan Alexander

Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Robert Alexander. Jacob Glickman for Susan Alexander (Respondent).

Mr. Glickman stated that his Client feels that she has accounted, that she has provided statements for the credit cards, the checking account and the Neuberger Berman account, and that she has given them everything. Ms. Hinshaw stated that there was personal property in the estate that is unaccounted for, that there is significant property missing, that two $60,000.00 checks were issued and that they need more explanation. Mr. Alexander stated that the statements are not comprehensive and that some of the statements are missing for 2011. The accounting petition in case number 296378 was continued to June 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court granted the Petition for Order Compelling Attorney-In-Fact to Account, etc. in case number 297476 (subject to review of the order). Attorney's fees are denied without prejudice. The accounting period is to cover from October 2006 through date of death November 25, 2012. Status on filing of the accounting was set in case number 297476 for June 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
